raw_response: {"file_type":"openapi_specification","line_count":1,"functions":[],"classes":[],"imports":[],"complexity_notes":"This is an OpenAPI 3.1.0 specification for a Task Manager REST API (v2.4.1). The document defines a production-grade API with 8 main endpoints: /tasks (GET, POST), /tasks/{task_id} (GET, PATCH, DELETE), /tasks/{task_id}/assign, /tasks/{task_id}/comments (GET, POST), /tasks/{task_id}/attachments (GET, POST), /tasks/search, and /tasks/batch. The API supports pagination, filtering, full-text search, and batch operations. It includes 5 tags: Tasks, Assignments, Comments, Attachments, and Search & Batch. Authentication is handled via JWT (bearerAuth) or API key. The specification defines 10 reusable schemas: TaskStatus, Priority, User, Task, TaskCreateRequest, TaskUpdateRequest, Comment, Attachment, Pagination, ErrorResponse, TaskListResponse, and CommentListResponse. It also defines 4 standard error responses (BadRequest, Unauthorized, NotFound, InternalError). The API runs on 3 servers: production, staging, and local development."}
